name: Houthis (Yemen)
summary: Day 67-68 quiet — UKMTO mid-April 2026 guidance has Bab el-Mandeb / Gulf of Aden at MODERATE; no confirmed incidents affecting maritime traffic since prior reporting window. Houthi rhetoric remains elevated, capability preserved, but no kinetic action against neutral shipping. The April 8 ceasefire framework holds operationally. Per intel.md A10: UNCHANGED — one-line reference; non-event IS the signal. The 'Houthis enter the war' framing is now durably falsified through Trump-Axios 'choking like a stuffed pig' rejection of Hormuz-First (Apr 29) — the most pressure-loaded escalation moment yet without Houthi operational response. Edge to shipping-tankers continues durable decay below 9.0. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): UKMTO JMIC Update 034 (April 19 cutoff): 'No confirmed maritime attacks, targeting behaviour, or suspicious approaches… Houthi rhetoric continuing without operational indicators.' MODERATE threat level unchanged. Abdul-Malik al-Houthi continues rhetorical positioning but operational silence has now extended 64 days from pre-ceasefire baseline through the most pressure-loaded weekend of the war: IRGC Wednesday kinetic resumption, CENTCOM 31-vessel Hormuz blockade-stat, Trump April 25 cancellation of Witkoff-Kushner dispatch, AND Trump's 3-5 day patience window expiring Sunday April 26 23:59 IST without strike. The IntelliNews March 24 'Houthis enter the war' framing is now structurally falsified. The Houthi-Iran command-relationship is operationally weaker than the rhetorical alliance suggests, OR Iran is deliberately holding the Houthi card in reserve. Soufan coordination-decay thesis substantially strengthens at Day 64. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

active_triggers.condition: Houthis begin confirmed Red Sea attacks on NEUTRAL commercial shipping (verified by maritime trackers) — Day 47 attacks RESUMED but ONLY on belligerent-linked vessels (US/UK/Israeli). Neutral shipping
Houthis launch confirmed attack on Israel (missile/drone reaching Israeli territory)

historical_summaries.summary: 10 signals. Abdul Malik al-Houthi declared group 'prepared to enter the war' with 'fingers on the trigger' in recorded address | Mohammed al-Bukhaiti (political bureau member, not military commander) told NYT: 'the expansion of the conflict to include other countries, | Three weeks into war, no Houthi attacks

22 signals. Day 33: STILL zero confirmed Houthi attacks on Red Sea commercial shipping | CONFIRMED ABSENCE: Day 34 of war — ZERO confirmed attacks on merchant shipping in Red Sea or Bab el-Mandeb | Day 35: ZERO confirmed Red Sea shipping attacks
